allow: Bash(docker compose exec db psql -U bridge -d bridge_dashboard -c "SELECT * FROM pg_available_extensions WHERE name = ''timescaledb'';")
Bash(docker compose exec db psql -U bridge -d bridge_dashboard -c "SELECT tablename FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname = ''public'';")
Bash(docker compose exec db psql -U bridge -d bridge_dashboard -c "\\dt")
Bash(docker compose exec db psql -U bridge -d bridge_dashboard -c "SELECT state, COUNT\(*\) FROM route_status GROUP BY state;")
Bash(docker compose exec db psql -U bridge -d bridge_dashboard -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM route_status;")
Bash(docker compose exec db psql -U bridge -d bridge_dashboard -c "SELECT DISTINCT src_chain FROM route_latest ORDER BY src_chain;")
Bash(docker compose exec db psql -U bridge -d bridge_dashboard -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM route_latest;")
Bash(docker compose exec db psql -U bridge -d bridge_dashboard -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM quotes;")
Bash(docker compose exec db psql -U bridge -d bridge_dashboard -c "SELECT DISTINCT src_chain FROM quotes ORDER BY src_chain;")
Bash(docker compose exec db psql -U bridge -d bridge_dashboard -c "SELECT DISTINCT dst_chain FROM quotes ORDER BY dst_chain;")

Bash(docker compose exec db psql -U bridge -d bridge_dashboard -c "SELECT table_name, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = t.table_name\) as col_count FROM information_schema.tables t WHERE table_schema = ''public'' ORDER BY table_name;")

Bash(docker compose exec db psql -U bridge -d bridge_dashboard -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as cnt, ''fetch_log'' as tbl FROM fetch_log UNION ALL SELECT COUNT\(*\), ''quotes'' FROM quotes UNION ALL SELECT COUNT\(*\), ''route_latest'' FROM route_latest UNION ALL SELECT COUNT\(*\), ''route_status'' FROM route_status;")
